graph_changes: Node card now shows acronym + role + human-readable status badge only.
Removed src:/w:/⚠ fields from node card. They live in the inspector via SystemInspector.
Status text uses humanTrustLabel(node.trust_state) so the operator sees Blocked/Frozen/Caution/Ready/Unknown — not blocked_signal etc.
TrustGraphSection adds Fit / Scroll canvas toggle (data-testid=canvas-mode-toggle).
Scroll mode wraps the graph in overflow-x-auto with minWidth=1100px so the operator can pan a usable graph on iPhone-width viewports.
Header is sticky on the Graph tab; the operator can keep Mode / Show all / Recompute / Fit-Scroll controls in view while scrolling the canvas.

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: operator can pan a usable graph rather than staring at a thumbnail
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: Scroll canvas mode renders min-width:1100px in overflow-x-auto wrapper; operator scrolls horizontally

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: node status badge shows Blocked everywhere; not internal code

abuse_cases.actual_behavior: shortPurpose truncates role to 18 chars; only acronym + role + status are shown

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: default view hides secondary/weak edges; full registry mode shows everything
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: registryContract.edge_classes marks secondary and weak_observed as visibility=full_only; default focus mode + isPrimaryEdge gating is unchanged; existing 'Show all' toggle handles full registry view

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: graph still renders the registry; recompute button is visible
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: TrustGraphSection's recompute button is sticky in header; the empty graph case shows fail-closed warning + recompute

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Top 3 overlay does not appear; warning surfaces
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: extractTopThreeRecommendations returns empty cards on stale; graph payload focus_systems still uses priority overlay only when fresh

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: inspector lives below the graph on mobile and the same column on desktop
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: SystemInspector renders directly below SystemTrustGraph in the same data-testid=graph-main-panel column
